title: Jury orders Cosby to pay $19m to ex-waitress after finding he abused her in 1972
summary_full: Donna Motsinger alleged Cosby gave her wine and a pill that left her incapacitated after picking her up in a limousine in 1972.
summary_public: Donna Motsinger alleged Cosby gave her wine and a pill that left her incapacitated after picking her up in a limousine in 1972.
